ground_truth_proxy_provenance.details: GAO77 labels provide range/object targets; RD Doppler boxes are explicitly diagnostic proxies, not Doppler GT.

threshold_leakage.details: Weak thresholds are train-only; output flags threshold_leakage=false and used_test_clean_map_property_for_threshold=false.

fixed_pfa_protocol.details: PFA thresholds are calibrated on validation background and measured on test background.

mask_proxy_diagnostics.details: Mask and proxy diagnostics are computed through evaluation functions and written as CSV outputs.

score_normalization.details: No metric is normalized by model output extrema; raw hits, Pd, PFA, and FA are reported.

result_existence_numeric_consistency.details: Core D5E artifacts and numbers are consistent. At audit time, handoff referenced audit/result-to-claim files before both existed.

dead_code_metric_path.details: Required diagnostic functions are called and outputs are written.

scope_constraints.details: No D6, no false alarm penalty, no clean identity full method, no full loss, no detector change, no larger model, no confirmed RD performance claim.

action_items: Keep claims limited to RD-proxy ceiling diagnosis.
Do not proceed to D6 from this evidence.

claim_impact.claim: D5E diagnoses a ceiling effect in the current RD proxy setup.
Weak weighting improves RD weak-target preservation.
Confirmed RD performance or D6 continuation.
